mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (name, provider_id, provider, role, profile_image_url, is_deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{providerId}, #{provider}, #{role}, #{profileImageUrl}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM member WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
